chapters.summary: Covers basics of percentages, calculation shortcuts, successive percentage changes, ratio and proportion, division of quantities in ratios, and mixture/allegation concepts.

keyConcepts.title: Successive Percentage Change
keyConcepts.description: If a value changes by a% and then by b%, the net percentage change is given by (a + b + ab/100)%.

keyConcepts.title: Rule of Allegation
keyConcepts.description: Used to find the ratio in which two ingredients of different prices must be mixed to produce a mixture of a mean price.

formulas.name: Compound Ratio
formulas.description: Multiplying the terms of two or more ratios.

practiceResources.title: CUET Quant Practice Worksheet with Solutions

quizzes.question: If A's salary is 25% more than B's salary, then B's salary is how much percent less than A's salary?
quizzes.explanation: Let B's salary be 100. Then A's salary = 125. B's salary is less than A's by (125-100)=25. Percentage less = (25 / 125) * 100 = 20%.
